assertions.assertion: Output must score at least three areas at 4/5 or higher
Output must not recommend tooling the team already has (e.g. Datadog, feature flags, SLOs)
Output must give at least one non-trivial medium- or long-term recommendation
assertions.evidence: Implement mutation testing to ensure that the system is robust against unexpected input or errors.

assertions.assertion: Output must acknowledge the low incident rate of 0.1 P1/month
assertions.evidence: Their incident rate is low with 0.1 P1 per month and 0.5 P2 per month.

assertions.assertion: Output must include at least one improvement item
assertions.evidence: Evaluate implementing pair programming or code reviews by multiple engineers to improve code quality.
